headline: Guy Orders Pizza With 47 Toppings, Delivery Driver Quits On The Spot
summary: The pizza box had to be custom-made. The driver's resignation letter read 'I can't do this anymore.'
fullBody: Jake McPizza ordered a pizza with 47 different toppings. 'I wanted to try everything,' Jake said. The pizza weighed 14 pounds. The delivery driver, Kevin, took one look at the order and quit. 'I can't be a part of this,' Kevin said. The pizza took 3 hours to make. It was delivered by the manager, who also quit. Jake ate 2 slices. The rest is in his fridge, 'for later.'
